source_pr.title: executor, tests: move more test cases from `join_test.go` and `write_test.go` to `integrationtest`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #47076

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: executor tests migration: move join/write test cases into tests/integrationtest (no concrete flaky signature isolated)
failure_signature: move join/write test cases into tests/integrationtest (migration + golden refresh)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly migrates executor join/write test cases from Go tests into the `tests/integrationtest/` harness and refreshes the corresponding `.test/.result` files and Bazel build rules. The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature tied to a specific root cause mechanism (the captured evidence line is a comment/query snippet), so we keep the conservative fallback classification rather than guessing.
fix_pattern: Test-suite migration: move executor join/write cases into `tests/integrationtest/` and refresh golden outputs/build configs (no specific flaky root cause proven in patch).

evidence: evidence: move join/write test cases into tests/integrationtest (migration + golden refresh)

analysis:
PR title: executor, tests: move more test cases from `join_test.go` and `write_test.go` to `integrationtest`
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/47420
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: move join/write test cases into tests/integrationtest (migration + golden refresh)
Changed files (8): executor/test/jointest/BUILD.bazel, executor/test/jointest/join_test.go, executor/test/writetest/BUILD.bazel, executor/test/writetest/write_test.go, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/join.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/write.result, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/join.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/write.test
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
